question: Write a method to implement binary search
model_answer: static int bs(int[] a,int x){ int l=0,r=a.length-1; while(l<=r){ int m=(l+r)/2; if(a[m]==x) return m; else if(a[m]<x) l=m+1; else r=m-1;} return -1; }
student_answer: static int bs(int[] a,int x){ for(int i=0;i<a.length;i++){ if(a[i]==x) return i;} return -1; }

question: Write a method to reverse array
model_answer: static int[] rev(int[] arr){ for(int i=0;i<arr.length/2;i++){ int t=arr[i]; arr[i]=arr[arr.length-1-i]; arr[arr.length-1-i]=t;} return arr; }

question: Write a method to reverse words in a sentence
model_answer: static String revWords(String s){ String[] w=s.split(" "); Collections.reverse(Arrays.asList(w)); return String.join(" ",w);}
student_answer: static String revWords(String s){ String[] w=s.split(" "); String res=""; for(int i=w.length-1;i>=0;i--){ res+=w[i]+" "; } return res.trim(); }

question: Write a method to find GCD of two numbers
model_answer: static int gcd(int a,int b){ return b==0?a:gcd(b,a%b);}

question: Write a method to check Armstrong number

question: Write a method to check if a number is prime

question: Find frequency of characters in a string
model_answer: static Map<Character,Integer> freq(String s){ Map<Character,Integer> m=new HashMap<>(); for(char c:s.toCharArray()) m.put(c,m.getOrDefault(c,0)+1); return m; }
student_answer: static Map<Character,Integer> freq(String s){ Map<Character,Integer> m=new HashMap<>(); for(char c:s.toCharArray()){ if(m.containsKey(c)) m.put(c,m.get(c)+1); else m.put(c,1);} return m; }

question: Check balanced parentheses
model_answer: static boolean bal(String s){ Stack<Character> st=new Stack<>(); for(char c:s.toCharArray()){ if(c=='(') st.push(c); else if(c==')'){ if(st.isEmpty()) return false; st.pop(); }} return st.isEmpty(); }
student_answer: static boolean bal(String s){ int c=0; for(char ch:s.toCharArray()){ if(ch=='(') c++; else if(ch==')') c--; if(c<0) return false;} return c==0; }

question: Find first non-repeating character
model_answer: static char fnr(String s){ Map<Character,Integer> m=new HashMap<>(); for(char c:s.toCharArray()) m.put(c,m.getOrDefault(c,0)+1); for(char c:s.toCharArray()) if(m.get(c)==1) return c; return '_'; }
student_answer: static char fnr(String s){ for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++){ if(s.indexOf(s.charAt(i))==s.lastIndexOf(s.charAt(i))) return s.charAt(i);} return '_'; }

question: Check if array is sorted

student_answer: static boolean sorted(int[] arr){ return true; }

question: Find sum of even numbers in array

student_answer: static int sumEven(int[] arr){ int s=0; for(int i:arr) s+=i; return s; }

question: Merge two arrays
model_answer: static int[] merge(int[] a,int[] b){ int[] r=new int[a.length+b.length]; System.arraycopy(a,0,r,0,a.length); System.arraycopy(b,0,r,a.length,b.length); return r; }
student_answer: static int[] merge(int[] a,int[] b){ int[] r=new int[a.length+b.length]; for(int i=0;i<a.length;i++) r[i]=a[i]; for(int i=0;i<b.length;i++) r[a.length+i]=b[i]; return r; }

question: Find duplicates in array
model_answer: static Set<Integer> dup(int[] arr){ Set<Integer> s=new HashSet<>(),d=new HashSet<>(); for(int i:arr){ if(!s.add(i)) d.add(i);} return d; }
student_answer: static Set<Integer> dup(int[] arr){ Set<Integer> s=new HashSet<>(); for(int i:arr){ if(s.contains(i)) return s; else s.add(i);} return s; }

question: Convert string to integer
model_answer: static int toInt(String s){ return Integer.parseInt(s); }

question: Check if a string is a valid IPv4 address
model_answer: public static boolean isIP(String s){ String[] p=s.split("\\."); if(p.length!=4) return false; for(String x:p){ int n=Integer.parseInt(x); if(n<0||n>255) return false;} return true; }
student_answer: public static boolean isIP(String s){ String[] p=s.split("\\."); if(p.length!=4) return false; for(String x:p){ try{ int n=Integer.parseInt(x); if(n<0||n>255) return false;}catch(Exception e){ return false;} } return true; }

question: Find first missing positive number
model_answer: public static int firstMissing(int[] arr){ java.util.Set<Integer> set=new java.util.HashSet<>(); for(int x:arr) set.add(x); for(int i=1;i<=arr.length+1;i++){ if(!set.contains(i)) return i;} return -1; }
student_answer: public static int firstMissing(int[] arr){ java.util.Arrays.sort(arr); int expected=1; for(int x:arr){ if(x==expected) expected++; } return expected; }

question: Find factorial of large number (avoid overflow)
model_answer: public static java.math.BigInteger fact(int n){ java.math.BigInteger res=java.math.BigInteger.ONE; for(int i=2;i<=n;i++) res=res.multiply(java.math.BigInteger.valueOf(i)); return res; }
student_answer: public static int fact(int n){ int res=1; for(int i=2;i<=n;i++) res*=i; return res; }

question: Check if string has all unique characters
model_answer: public static boolean unique(String s){ java.util.Set<Character> set=new java.util.HashSet<>(); for(char c:s.toCharArray()){ if(!set.add(c)) return false;} return true; }
student_answer: public static boolean unique(String s){ for(int i=0;i<s.length();i++){ for(int j=i+1;j<s.length();j++){ if(s.charAt(i)==s.charAt(j)) return false;} } return true; }

question: Check if number is even
model_answer: public static boolean even(int n){ return n%2==0; }
student_answer: public static boolean even(int n){ return (n&1)==0; }

question: Validate a password (min 8 chars, at least 1 digit, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase)
model_answer: public static boolean valid(String s){ return s.length()>=8 && s.matches(".*[0-9].*") && s.matches(".*[A-Z].*") && s.matches(".*[a-z].*"); }
student_answer: public static boolean valid(String s){ if(s.length()<8) return false; boolean d=false,u=false,l=false; for(char c:s.toCharArray()){ if(Character.isDigit(c)) d=true; if(Character.isUpperCase(c)) u=true; if(Character.isLowerCase(c)) l=true; } return d&&u&&l; }

question: Find the longest common prefix among strings
model_answer: public static String lcp(String[] arr){ String p=arr[0]; for(int i=1;i<arr.length;i++){ while(!arr[i].startsWith(p)) p=p.substring(0,p.length()-1);} return p; }
student_answer: public static String lcp(String[] arr){ String res=""; for(int i=0;i<arr[0].length();i++){ char c=arr[0].charAt(i); for(String s:arr){ if(i>=s.length()||s.charAt(i)!=c) return res; } res+=c; } return res; }

question: Check if a number is Armstrong
model_answer: public static boolean arm(int n){ int k=String.valueOf(n).length(),t=n,sum=0; while(t>0){ int d=t%10; sum+=Math.pow(d,k); t/=10;} return sum==n; }
student_answer: public static boolean arm(int n){ int sum=0,t=n; while(t>0){ int d=t%10; sum+=d*d*d; t/=10;} return sum==n; }
